title: limonium chrysocomum var. chrysocephalum
intro: Limonium chrysocomum var. chrysocephalum, also known as sea lavender or Chrysocephalum, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Plumbaginaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits associated with this plant include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The herbal preparations of Limonium chrysocomum var. chrysocephalum include infusions, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
